textByHash.c0e5924516359c8507433813d576e3bad19a45d1: Not the hunt for other beings! The hunt for knowledge.
textByHash.49e0e3496675fd8d02615b8a1084b4b1476cba7d: Maybe for someone like you, but to us followers of Zamorak, there's relics of his mighty power everywhere.
textByHash.3b85656a619e7fb3254b83604246f77dcd86250c: That doesn't bother us. Our lord will protect us, we hunt in service of him.
textByHash.c239a534a6c09ba048bed243c2dd3ae960f41b67: Be that as it may, it is our duty to honour our god and hunt for knowledge.
textByHash.127b454b59ffba1feb3572b4cb9eca8241144bc6: All power to the almighty Zamorak.
textByHash.a10aa6217f6f385ffb3ea9898a7f974262d18346: We are here in service of the only true god.
